use std::fs::File;
use std::io::Write;

fn write_csv(path: &str, rows: &[Row]) -> std::io::Result<()> {
    let mut file = File::create(path)?;
    // BAD: unbuffered write per row — syscall per write
    for row in rows {
        writeln!(file, "{},{},{}", row.id, row.name, row.value)?;
    }
    Ok(())
}

struct Row {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    value: f64,
}
